name: Meilisearch
description: Meilisearch is an open-source, lightning-fast search engine designed for instant, typo-tolerant, and relevant search experiences. It provides RESTful APIs for indexing documents, searching with filters and facets, and managing search settings with minimal configuration.

capabilities.name: indexes_list
capabilities.description: List all indexes in the Meilisearch instance with pagination.

capabilities.name: indexes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new index with an optional primary key. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: indexes_get
capabilities.description: Get information about a specific index by its UID.

capabilities.name: indexes_update
capabilities.description: Update the primary key of an index. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: indexes_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an index and all its documents. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: indexes_swap
capabilities.description: Swap the documents, settings, and task history of two or more index pairs atomically.

capabilities.name: documents_list
capabilities.description: List documents in an index with pagination, field selection, and optional filtering.

capabilities.name: documents_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single document from an index by its document ID.

capabilities.name: documents_add_or_replace
capabilities.description: Add new documents or replace existing ones (matched by primary key). Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: documents_add_or_update
capabilities.description: Add new documents or update fields of existing ones (partial update, matched by primary key). Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: documents_delete_all
capabilities.description: Delete all documents in an index. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: documents_delete_one
capabilities.description: Delete a single document from an index by its document ID. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: documents_delete_batch
capabilities.description: Delete multiple documents by their IDs in a single request. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: documents_fetch
capabilities.description: Fetch documents using a POST body with filters, fields selection, and pagination (alternative to GET).

capabilities.name: search
capabilities.description: Perform a full-text search query on an index with support for filters, facets, sorting, highlighting, geo-search, and pagination.

capabilities.name: multi_search
capabilities.description: Execute multiple search queries across one or more indexes in a single HTTP request. Supports federated search to merge results.

capabilities.name: facet_search
capabilities.description: Search for facet values within an index, useful for building dynamic filter UIs.

capabilities.name: settings_get
capabilities.description: Get all settings of an index including ranking rules, searchable attributes, filterable attributes, and more.

capabilities.name: settings_update
capabilities.description: Update all settings of an index at once. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: settings_reset
capabilities.description: Reset all settings of an index to their default values. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: tasks_list
capabilities.description: List all tasks with filtering by status, type, index UID, and date ranges. Tasks track asynchronous operations.

capabilities.name: tasks_get
capabilities.description: Get the status and details of a single task by its UID.

capabilities.name: tasks_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel enqueued or processing tasks matching the given filters. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: tasks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete finished tasks (succeeded, failed, or canceled) matching the given filters.

capabilities.name: keys_list
capabilities.description: List all API keys with pagination.

capabilities.name: keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new API key with specified actions, indexes, and optional expiration.

capabilities.name: keys_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific API key by its UID or key value.

capabilities.name: keys_update
capabilities.description: Update the name or description of an existing API key.

capabilities.name: keys_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an API key by its UID or key value.

capabilities.name: stats_get_all
capabilities.description: Get stats for all indexes including the number of documents, index sizes, and database size.

capabilities.name: stats_get_index
capabilities.description: Get stats for a specific index including the number of documents and field distribution.

capabilities.name: health_check
capabilities.description: Check if the Meilisearch instance is healthy and available.

capabilities.name: version_get
capabilities.description: Get the version of the Meilisearch instance, including commit SHA and build date.

capabilities.name: dumps_create
capabilities.description: Create a database dump. The dump is a snapshot of the entire Meilisearch data that can be used for backup or migration. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: snapshots_create
capabilities.description: Create a snapshot of the Meilisearch database for backup. Returns an asynchronous task.

capabilities.name: experimental_features_get
capabilities.description: Get the status of all experimental features.

capabilities.name: experimental_features_update
capabilities.description: Enable or disable experimental features. Returns the updated feature flags.
